programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: After Bob slips on the sidewalk, he is forced to take legal action in order to pay for surgery. In a turn of events, Bob finds himself under the care of Jairo, who promises to help him heal without a doctor. Meanwhile, the kids create a fake law firm to settle their personal discrepancies.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: After a family vote rules against buying a new couch during TV Night, Louise takes matters into her own hands. programme.title: MasterChef Canada

programme.title: Suits

He must decide whether he will compromise his ethical code when it is clear that it is the only way he will win this case. Meanwhile, Rachel is suspected of disloyalty to the firm and Mike must defend her when it is clear that things are not what they appear to be.

programme.title: The Ricky Gervais Show
programme.desc: A fan letter asks Karl: If he were on a sinking ship, and could only save either Ricky or Stephen, who would he choose? Karl finds a news report that hedgehogs will be extinct by 2025. Also up for discussion: the story of a man who has a transplanted kidney from a woman and now claims he has an increased interest in housework. In "Monkey News": The owner of an airline reportedly hired a monkey to fly as co-pilot during a strike.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie visit a nearby golf course to pitch a package deal with the motel, but Johnny becomes distracted by his desire to play a round of golf. programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: When David contemplates starting a new business in town, Moira uses her seat on town council to protect her son's interests. programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall and Lily drag the gang to Atlantic City to elope, and their quest to overcome the three-day wait for a marriage license crosses them with some Chinese gamblers, a ship captain, and a sexy novelty shirt.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.sub-title: Those Big Pink Things with Coconut
programme.desc: The brothers throw out their mother, after she insults the way Alan is raising Jake. When Alan and Charlie ignore her phone calls, to get their attention she ends up in the hospital. Jack goes undercover to find Joseph Wald, where he learns that CTU is going to be bombed. While Kim tries to save Meghan from her abusive father, Gary. Kate Warner becomes suspicious of sister's Middle-Eastern fiancé.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers an ancient artifact that takes O'Neill and the S.G.C. hostage.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica caters a party for her mother, who still doesn't quite know how to talk to her daughter. Chandler's encounter with Rachel's boss leads to an embarrassing situation. And an encyclopedia salesman takes advantage of Joey.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Joey attempts ballroom dancing in order to help Monica and Rachel keep their illegal sublet. Phoebe is attracted to one of her massage clients. And Ross tries to help Chandler quit the gym.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joey's New Girlfriend

Ross and Rachel play the jealousy game in their relationships. And Phoebe desperately tries to catch a cold after discovering that her voice is sexier and her singing better when she has phlegm in her throat.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: A two-year-old boy in a Virginia park is mysteriously killed, and a further look shows a ghostly figure luring him. Mulder and Scully investigate despite an existing official inquiry, and learn that the boy's brother is in great danger as well - for evil follows evil.

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy and her friends discover secrets about themselves as they battle a werewolf, its hunter, and their own emotions.

programme.desc: Frasier is devastated when he learns that his learned mentor has been dating Carla, who also has a little surprise of her own.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug feels the urge for a new car and against Carrie's advice buys it for himself only to find out moments later that the workers at the IPS company are going on strike. He unsuccessfully tries to return the car, forcing Carrie to work major overtime to compensate for his mistake.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: It is week two of the IPS strike, and Doug still has not gotten a job. To get back on his feet, his sister Stephanie get him a substitute teacher job at her school. However, it is a high school, and the kids are not so nice. Can Doug survive?

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maggie's tyrannical gym teacher turns out to be Fran's former teacher. Maxwell hires an abrasive megastar.

programme.title: The Nanny

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: After George forgets he and Angie's anniversary, he goes to drastic measures to make it up to her. He takes her to a jewelry store, but the ring she picks is far out of George's price range and he must find a way to pay for it - or feel Angie's wrath.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: Carmen is not invited back to private school for the new semester, so Angie decides to homeschool her. But when the mother-daughter relationship becomes strained, George suggests a much better career option for his wife.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier may have to scratch his dream of becoming the head of the wine club after Niles accidentally gouges Frasier's floor on the eve of an important wine tasting. programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier rallies the on-air talent to back the support staff in a labour dispute with station manager Kate Costas (guest star Mercedes Ruehl). programme.title: Hell's Kitchen (US)

programme.desc:
Nicki Chapman is property hunting with a London couple in search of a perfect country retreat in Buckinghamshire. With a generous budget of £950,000 can we pull it off?

programme.desc: Lido Di Manhattan Beach in California is owned by Lisa, who proudly goes on about her young age and ownership, yet is oblivious to the faults said age and lack of experience has brought. And then Ramsay starts investigating the kitchen.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Amy work together on a case, and wind up arguing over Jake's old, worn-out mattress. Meanwhile, Boyle scratches Holt's prized car, and the teenage boy Rosa sponsors as a "big brother" is in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The growing bond between man, Jay, and dog, Stella, is grating on Gloria's nerves; Phil and Luke embark on a new adventure involving a tightrope, but it's Claire with the missteps, as she tries to teach the girls a life lesson; and Cameron chooses the most inopportune time to start a juice fast.

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.desc: A cult predicting the end of the world reserves a park, Leslie becomes jealous when another woman takes interest in Ben, Tom throws a huge party for the closing of Entertainment 7Twenty, and Andy and April try to do something stupid.

programme.desc: Leslie enlists the help of Ben, Andy and April to host a Model U.N. for Pawnee Central High School. Chris asks Ann for her advice on love when a date cancels on him. Meanwhile, Ron struggles to find a replacement for Tom.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: After digging up the skeletal remains of a young girl, the investigation points to a convicted serial killer on death row. The team follows cryptic clues that lead to another body, an accomplice, and a victim who may still be alive.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: There are two suspects with the same motive when Booth and Brennan investigate the murder of a man found in a bathtub full of chemicals. They soon discover that he had two wives and a girlfriend.

programme.title: Bones

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: When Tina volunteers alongside Nurse Liz, she finds herself involved in the biggest scandal to hit Wagstaff: a lice infestation. Meanwhile, Bob makes improvements to the restaurant that end up driving customers away. Can the Belchers juggle both a crisis at the restaurant and lice?

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: When there is a bounce house crisis at Regular Sized Rudy’s birthday party, the Belcher kids devise a scheme to save the day. Meanwhile, Bob deals with an unexpected guest at the restaurant and is forced to come to terms with a longstanding fear.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: When Gene overhears talk about a mystical creature that lives nearby, he leads the Belcher kids and their friends on a journey to find it. Meanwhile, Linda's competitive nature takes over during downtime at the restaurant.

programme.desc: Jack bumps Jenna's scheduled appearance on 'Late Night with Conan O'Brien' by booking new star Tracy. programme.title: Portlandia
programme.desc: Marc and Linda cover Portland's Allergy Pride Parade; Doug's and Claire's lives spin out of control as they become obsessed with Battlestar Galactica; A couple try to find an original gift in a knot store; Carrie can't abide the tattoo of her new boyfriend.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek

programme.desc: Ted and Barney discusses their viewpoints on knowing things about women. Barney thinks that the more you know the more likely you are to find a deal breaker. Ted wants to know the deal breakers right away, as Robin refuses to go to the mall to cover her secret.

programme.desc: Barney's brother, James (Wayne Brady), visits and Robin, the only one in the group that has never met him, is suprised. But James has a surprise for Barney that he finds difficult to swallow.

programme.desc: Alan starts to worry about a medical procedure that he is facing, and to get his mind off it, Charlie suggests they go to Las Vegas.

programme.desc: As Valentine's Day approaches, Xander tries to improve his love life through witchcraft and finds himself with too much of a good thing.

programme.desc: Leslie uses her new tourist attraction as a way to spend more time with Ben. Meanwhile, Ron and April encourage Andy to go to college, and Chris tasks Tom and Jerry with revamping the Parks and Rec logo.

programme.desc: Things come to a head for Leslie, Ben and Chris.

programme.desc: When Bob's longtime friend, Critter, finds himself in jail for unpaid parking tickets, the Belchers decide to do what they can to help him out. Meanwhile, Linda takes on a babysitting job that becomes more work than she signed up for.

programme.desc: When Dottie Minerva comes down with a bad case of mono, Tina gets her shot as soloist of the Hormone-iums. programme.title: Bob's Burgers

programme.desc: Moira and Roland find themselves in a compromising situation. Alexis drives a wedge between David and Patrick.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: After several disappearances in a small town, Mulder and Scully investigate and find hundreds of human bones in the river. They discover that the man behind the town's main source of wealth, a chicken processing plant, has found a way to prolong his life through cannibalism.

programme.title: The X-Files

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier sends out a radio call for a new friend, and ends up meeting Bob, a barbecue-obsessed photographer. Frasier can't stand the man's company, but because Bob is in a wheelchair, feels too guilty to dump him.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.desc:

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares (US)

programme.title: George Lopez

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: After Jacob reveals a detail about his personal life, Janine realizes she doesn't know the other teachers as well as she thought; Gregory's stern teaching approach is causing his whole class to underperform.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything
programme.desc: Adam explores the twisted history of the Electoral College, explaining that the Founding Fathers did not want most Americans to vote. He also takes a stab at fixing a political system that seems rigged against true democracy.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything
programme.desc: Adam shows how the 40-hour work week not only exhausts employees but also harms businesses, reveals the legal mess of hiring interns and freelancers, and explores how discussing your salary with co-workers is actually a good thing.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: With Wolowitz AWOL with one of her friends, Penny's recruited to fill in for him on the guys' Halo team

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's parents set him up on a blind date, but just when he discovers he can talk to her, she shows interest in Sheldon.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jake makes an arrest without a lot of proof, he only has 48 hours to collect evidence, or else the "perp" will be released. After his unsuccessful interrogation of the suspect, Jake forces his co-workers to spend their weekend helping him crack the case. So, while the team is stuck at the precinct, Charles judges a pie contest between Gina and Rosa, and Holt helps Terry look better in the eyes of his in-laws.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's dream comes true when he gets to spend the day with his hero, Jimmy Brogan (guest star Stacy Keach), a former crime reporter. Meanwhile, Terry and Charles try to teach Rosa how to be less terrifying on the witness stand.

programme.title: Community
programme.desc: Jeff has the hots for his statistics professor and is determined to take her out on a date. programme.title: Community
programme.desc: When Jeff loses his home and his car, he is forced to move into Abed's dorm room. Troy has a big date, but why is a jealous Annie trying to help? Meanwhile, Pierce becomes the keyboardist for Vaughn's band.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A power outage leaves Chandler stranded in an ATM vestibule with Victoria's Secret model Jill Goodacre, whom he desperately tries to impress, Ross tries to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns that Monica used to be infatuated with him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Monica and Ross mourn the death of their grandmother with a little help from the gang, and Monica and her mom come to an unspoken understanding about the relationship between mothers and daughters. Meanwhile, Chandler is irritated by office speculation that he is gay.

programme.title: Hancock

The agent's idea of imprisoning the antihero to make the world miss him proves successful, but will Hancock stick to his new sense of purpose or slip back into old habits?

programme.title: Black Dynamite

The Man killed his brother, pumped heroin into local orphanages, and flooded the ghetto with adulterated malt liquor. Black Dynamite was the one hero willing to fight The Man all the way from the blood-soaked city streets to the hallowed halls of the Honky House..

programme.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox

programme.title: Mel Giedroyc: Unforgivable

programme.title: Mel Giedroyc: Unforgivable

programme.title: The Great North

programme.title: The Great North

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: As Lily becomes more of a permanent fixture in the apartment, Ted feels like he is being edged out of the mix by his engaged roomies. programme.title: The Middle
programme.desc: Frankie must create the illusion of a picture-perfect family when an accident causing a small scratch on Brick leads a social worker to visit the Heck household.

programme.title: The Middle

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The whole family comes out to support Manny's newfound interest - fencing. It turns out he's quite masterful in the sport, but Jay's proud enthusiasm triggers an old childhood wound for Mitchell. Meanwhile Phil is determined to find where Luke's hidden talents lie.

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: New Girl

programme.title: New Girl

programme.title: Scott Pilgrim vs. the World

But when Ramona Flowers skates into his heart, he finds she has the most troublesome baggage of all: an army of ex-boyfriends who will stop at nothing to eliminate him from her list of suitors.

But when he worries he’s outlived his usefulness and the dissection table is drawing uncomfortably close, Paul escapes on the first RV that passes by his compound in Area 51. Fortunately, it contains the two earthlings who are most likely to rescue and harbor an alien on the run.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything

programme.title: Community

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Underdog Gets Away

programme.title: Friends
